description: Parse the generated command using `[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseInput`. Extract command names, parameters, string-literal paths, and dynamic-invocation hints. Multi-command scripts inherit the highest risk of any contained command.
notes: AST gives ground truth; regex (saf-01) is fast but evadable. Always run both before classification.
steps: TDD: Parse error stops execution and returns structured error.
TDD: Single-command script extracts the command name.
TDD: Multi-command script returns one entry per command.
TDD: Aliases (e.g. `gci`) are flagged as a violation of "no aliases" rule from §6.6.
TDD: Dynamic invocation (e.g. `& $cmd`) flagged as suspicious.
TDD: String-literal paths extracted where present.
name: [saf-02] PowerShell AST safety parser
